title: Netherite Upgrade Crafting Recipe
description: This project adds a simple crafting recipe for the Netherite Upgrade Template, so you don't have to spend hours looking for a bastion to get one.
body:
**A simple datapack that adds a crafting recipe for the Netherite Upgrade Template to Minecraft.** 

I made this mod for people who don't want to spend hours looking for a Bastion in hopes of finding one. If you have any suggestions for other recipes I should make, just let me know.

![The crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c1abfebff34edb04894e365ea2411248e5f186b.png)
